name: Hierarchical Task Decomposition
description: Break any ambiguous goal into a dependency-ordered tree of concrete subtasks before executing.

name: Evidence-Graded Research Synthesis
description: Grade each claim by evidence quality and flag gaps — never flatten strong and weak evidence into the same confident voice.

name: Steelman Before Critique
description: Reconstruct the strongest possible version of an argument before critiquing — never attack the weakest interpretation.

name: What / So What / Now What
description: Structure analytical outputs in three layers: observable facts, interpreted meaning, and actionable recommendation.

name: Source Proximity Verification
description: Trace every fact, quote, or statistic to the closest possible primary source before citing it.
